name: Projects
githubInfo: Many other projects can be found on my {githubLink}, it would be too much to list them all here, definitely check it out!

project1.title: First Project
project1.description: This is the first sample project component.

details.description: Sanovise is a digital health assistant powered by artificial intelligence, designed to analyze user health data and provide meaningful insights.
details.stack: Tech Stack: Nuxt.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express.js, Transformers.js
details.features: Features: Health data analysis, AI medical record processing, JSON export/import.

wolimby.title: Wolimby [Archived]
wolimby.description: A web project created for learning and entertainment.

details.description: Archived since December 2024. Used in a class at the University of Debrecen in 2025.
details.stack: Tech Stack: Nuxt.js, TypeScript, Pinia, SCSS, Node.js, Express.js, Mongoose
details.features: Features: Link shortening, real-time chat, posts, games, and GIF profile pictures.

knightswap.title: Knight Swap
knightswap.description: Chess-based logic puzzle where the goal is to swap dark and light knights.

details.description: A 4x3 chessboard puzzle. The goal is to swap the positions of the three black and three white knights without them threatening each other.
details.features: Features: Graphic User Interface (GUI), Search Algorithm (BFS) console solver, Leaderboard and Interactive gameplay.

nexus.title: Operation: NEXUS
nexus.description: An immersive FBI-style digital forensics investigation game.

details.description: NEXUS is a web-based investigation simulation where you play as a digital detective. Using professional-grade tools, investigate cyber crimes, analyze digital evidence, and uncover conspiracies in realistic scenarios.
details.stack: Tech Stack: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript, SCSS, Pinia, Node.js, MongoDB, JWT
details.features: Features: Full Laptop Simulation, SecureMail, CipherChat, CryptoCracker (decryption tool), Evidence Locker, File Reader.

deik.title: University of Debrecen - IT Faculty
deik.description: Collection of university study materials, assignments, and projects.

details.description: This repository contains notes, assignments, and projects created during my studies at the Faculty of Informatics, University of Debrecen.
details.stack: Maintained specifically for students and knowledge seekers.
details.features: Content: Organized subjects, solved exam topics, educational resources.
